step_rationale: Cholesterol-efflux transporter; hypermethylation in CHD suppresses lipid-removal capacity.
mechanism: ABCG1 hypermethylation in CHD impairs cholesterol efflux and lipid homeostasis, promoting lipid retention and atherogenesis.

references.title: DNA methylation and lipid metabolism: an EWAS of 226 metabolic measures.
Cholesterol Efflux Pathways Suppress Inflammasome Activation, NETosis, and Atherogenesis.
Epigenome-wide association study of adiposity and future risk of obesity-related diseases.
Association between DNA methylation and coronary heart disease or other atherosclerotic events: A systematic review.
